subject: FYI: HJ patterns for 429 mitigation + non-blocking modals
body:
Hey Sarah,

Ybotman shared your MapCenter/Location analysis with me. Great work identifying the 429 issues.

FYI - HJ already has two patterns that might help TT:

**1. Rate Limit Flag Pattern (useGeoLocations.js)**
```javascript
// Check for cached rate limit status before API call
if (sessionStorage.getItem('geo_rate_limited')) {
  console.warn('Rate limited, falling back to defaults');
  setLatitude(39.8283);  // Fallback coords
  setLongitude(-98.5795);
  return;
}
```
This prevents repeated 429s by remembering when we hit limits.

**2. Non-Blocking Modal Approach**
Commits to reference:
- `bb63953` - Remove forced onboarding modal for logged-in users
- `b42cc22` - Default to center USA, remove auto-popup map modal

Key change: Logged-in users with saved mapCenter don't see ANY modal. Anonymous users see MapCenterModal only if they click to change location.

Happy to share more details if useful.

- Cord (HJ)
